#### Risk Rating: Low/Medium/High

---

#### PR Composition Checklist

* [ ] I have properly linked all related JIRA issues
* [ ] I have analyzed the changes proposed in this Pull Request and believe it to be sized and scoped suitably for reviewing
* [ ] I have checked the quality and security reports generated for the source branch and they are acceptable
* [ ] I have ensured the commits in this Pull Request are atomic and have descriptive messages
* [ ] I have assigned Trusted Reviewers as reviewers for this Pull Request
* [ ] I have assigned myself as the responsible party for managing this Pull Request

#### Reviewer's Checklist

<details><summary>Reviewer's Checklist</summary><ul><li>Read PR description and JIRA issues, validating that the requirements are met</li><li>Review quality and security reports</li><li>Review the logic of the code</li><li>Review the quality of the code in terms of readability and maintainability</li><li>Review observability characteristics of the proposed changes</li></ul></details>
